subject: Fwd: BEAR STEARNS/REED SMITH
body:
Amazing how once I asked for back up, the amount owed decreased by  
approximately 50%.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "Karides, Constantine" <CKarides@ReedSmith.com>
Subject: RE: BEAR STEARNS/REED SMITH
Date: Fri, 21 Dec 2007 18:12:15 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Darren,
 
I am attaching the backup.  Please note that in doing so, we recognized
that the initial invoice did not properly reflect what is owed by FTC.
The total amount due is actually approx $29,000.  Also, given the circs
of 11/16, we necessarily redacted many of the entries.  
 
Can you confirm both receipt of the attached and payment before year
end?
 
Thanks,
 
Constantine
 
 

________________________________

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, December 12, 2007 1:52 PM
To: Karides, Constantine
Subject: Re: BEAR STEARNS/REED SMITH


Would you please send me the appropriate back-up for the invoice you
sent me.  Thank you.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176

e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
